task_completion.description: Open and read the sampling protocol document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/sampling_protocol.txt.

task_completion.description: Configure the two safety parameters for descent rate in the flight controller.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Vehicle Setup / Parameters screen showing RTL_ALT set to 2000 and WPNAV_SPEED_DN set to 50.

task_completion.description: Create a mission waypoint at the target coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan View showing a waypoint created at Latitude 47.3970 and Longitude 8.5450.

task_completion.description: Add a Relay command to the mission plan to operate the sampling payload.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan View showing a 'Relay' (or Set Relay) command added to the mission sequence list.

task_completion.description: Add a Loiter Time command to the mission plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan View showing a 'Loiter Time' command added to the mission sequence list.

task_completion.description: Save the mission plan to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl file save dialog or confirmation showing the mission plan being saved as 'water_sampling.plan' in the /home/ga/Documents/QGC/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl graphical interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the QGroundControl application open and being actively interacted with, rather than terminal commands or scripts bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: The agent built the mission plan using the QGroundControl Plan View.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen adding waypoints and commands step-by-step in the QGC interface, rather than writing a .plan JSON file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent modified the flight controller parameters through the QGroundControl UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen searching for and modifying RTL_ALT and WPNAV_SPEED_DN in the QGC Parameters menu, not editing a configuration file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target coordinates for the waypoint: Latitude 47.3970, Longitude 8.5450. Required flight controller parameters: RTL_ALT must be set to 2000, and WPNAV_SPEED_DN must be set to 50. The mission plan must be saved exactly to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/water_sampling.plan.
